data.content:
Handoff for next state
- Worktree/branch ready for implementation: `/Users/cartine/foolery/.worktrees/foolery-94da` on `codex/foolery-94da-claude-approvals`; dependencies installed with `bun install --frozen-lockfile`.
- Current extraction answer: Claude AskUserQuestion approval requests already flow to `FOOLERY APPROVAL REQUIRED` banners via `approval-request-visibility` and runtime wiring.
- Implement shared Claude arg builders plus an explicit per-agent approval/non-bypass setting; keep omitted/default behavior as permission bypass.
- Primary files to touch: `src/lib/agent-adapter.ts`, `src/lib/terminal-manager-initial-child-helpers.ts`, `src/lib/terminal-manager-take-child-helpers.ts`, focused tests under `src/lib/__tests__/`; only touch schemas/settings/docs if using the config field route.
- Avoid OpenCode and approval UI/action files; other agents own those areas.
